Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 - <<'EOF'
import httpx, json, time

BASE = "http://localhost:8000"

queries = [
    "what handles Shopify authentication and session management?",
    "where is the GraphQL product mutation defined?",
    "webhook handler for uninstalled app event",
    "chat widget toggle button and UI rendering",
    "how does the app configure Shopify API version and scopes?",
    "Prisma database session storage setup",
]

client = httpx.Client\(base_url=BASE, timeout=60.0\)

for i, q in enumerate\(queries, 1\):
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    resp = client.post\("/search", json={"query": q, "top_k": 3, "rerank": True}\)
    elapsed = time.time\(\) - t0
    data = resp.json\(\)
    results = data.get\("results", []\)
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"Query {i}: {q[:55]}..."\)
    print\(f"  Status: {resp.status_code} | Results: {len\(results\)} | {elapsed:.2f}s"\)
    if results:
        top = results[0]
        print\(f"  Top hit: {top.get\('file_path','?'\)} \(score={top.get\('score',0\):.3f}\)"\)
        print\(f"  Symbol:  {top.get\('symbol_name','—'\)}"\)
    else:
        print\("  NO RESULTS"\)

print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
print\(f"All 6 queries completed."\)
EOF)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 - <<'EOF'
import httpx, json, time

BASE = "http://localhost:8000"

queries = [
    "what handles Shopify authentication and session management?",
    "where is the GraphQL product mutation defined?",
    "webhook handler for uninstalled app event",
    "chat widget toggle button and UI rendering",
    "how does the app configure Shopify API version and scopes?",
    "Prisma database session storage setup",
]

client = httpx.Client\(base_url=BASE, timeout=60.0\)

all_passed = True
for i, q in enumerate\(queries, 1\):
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    resp = client.post\("/search", json={"query": q, "top_k": 3, "rerank": True}\)
    elapsed = time.time\(\) - t0
    data = resp.json\(\)
    results = data.get\("results", []\)
    ok = resp.status_code == 200 and len\(results\) > 0
    all_passed = all_passed and ok
    status_icon = "✓" if ok else "✗"
    print\(f"\\n{status_icon} Query {i} \({elapsed:.2f}s\): {q[:55]}..."\)
    if results:
        top = results[0]
        print\(f"    Top: {top.get\('file','?'\)} lines {top.get\('lines','?'\)} | rerank={top.get\('rerank_score',0\):.3f}"\)
        print\(f"    Preview: {top.get\('preview',''\)[:80].strip\(\)!r}"\)
    else:
        print\("    NO RESULTS"\)
        all_passed = False

print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
print\(f"{'✓ ALL 6 QUERIES PASSED' if all_passed else '✗ SOME QUERIES FAILED'}"\)
EOF)

Bash(# Verify Activity Feed data — webhook_events table
source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from src.storage.db import AsyncSessionLocal
from sqlalchemy import text

async def check\(\):
    async with AsyncSessionLocal\(\) as s:
        r = await s.execute\(text\("""
            SELECT event_type, status, files_processed, errors,
                   duration_ms, created_at
            FROM webhook_events
            ORDER BY created_at DESC
            LIMIT 5
        """\)\)
        rows = r.fetchall\(\)
        print\(f"Recent webhook events \({len\(rows\)} rows\):"\)
        for row in rows:
            print\(f"  {row.event_type:10s} | {row.status:10s} | files={row.files_processed} | err={row.errors} | {row.duration_ms}ms"\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from src.storage.db import AsyncSessionLocal
from sqlalchemy import text

async def check\(\):
    async with AsyncSessionLocal\(\) as s:
        r = await s.execute\(text\("""
            SELECT column_name, data_type
            FROM information_schema.columns
            WHERE table_name = 'webhook_events'
            ORDER BY ordinal_position
        """\)\)
        for row in r.fetchall\(\):
            print\(f"  {row.column_name}: {row.data_type}"\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from src.storage.db import AsyncSessionLocal
from sqlalchemy import text

async def check\(\):
    async with AsyncSessionLocal\(\) as s:
        r = await s.execute\(text\("""
            SELECT event_type, status, files_changed, error_message,
                   received_at, processed_at
            FROM webhook_events
            ORDER BY received_at DESC
            LIMIT 5
        """\)\)
        rows = r.fetchall\(\)
        print\(f"Recent webhook events \({len\(rows\)} total\):"\)
        for row in rows:
            dur = None
            if row.processed_at and row.received_at:
                dur = \(row.processed_at - row.received_at\).total_seconds\(\)
            print\(f"  {row.event_type:10s} | {row.status:10s} | files={row.files_changed} | dur={dur}s"\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from src.storage.db import AsyncSessionLocal
from sqlalchemy import text

async def check\(\):
    async with AsyncSessionLocal\(\) as s:
        r = await s.execute\(text\("""
            SELECT event_type, status, files_changed, error_message,
                   received_at, processed_at
            FROM webhook_events
            ORDER BY received_at DESC
            LIMIT 3
        """\)\)
        rows = r.fetchall\(\)
        print\(f"Latest webhook events:"\)
        for row in rows:
            dur = None
            if row.processed_at and row.received_at:
                dur = f"{\(row.processed_at - row.received_at\).total_seconds\(\):.1f}s"
            print\(f"  {row.event_type:6s} | {row.status:10s} | files={row.files_changed} | duration={dur} | err={row.error_message}"\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from src.storage.db import AsyncSessionLocal
from sqlalchemy import text

async def check\(\):
    async with AsyncSessionLocal\(\) as s:
        # Check actual counts
        chunks = \(await s.execute\(text\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM chunks WHERE is_deleted=FALSE"\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        symbols = \(await s.execute\(text\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM symbols"\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f"chunks \(active\): {chunks}"\)
        print\(f"symbols: {symbols}"\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
EOF)
